---
title: "supplementary"
author: "Jair Andrade"
date: "2026-01-30"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(dplyr)
library(flavipack)
library(lubridate)
library(purrr)
library(readr)

source("./R_scripts/NMC.R")
source("./R_scripts/plots.R")
```

# S1

```{r}
plot_S1()

ggsave("./plots/suppl/S1.png")
```

# S3

```{r}
plot_S3()

ggsave("./plots/suppl/S3.png")
```
